name: Phishing Email Report
description: Internal form for employees to report suspicious emails that look like phishing. Submissions go to the SOC queue for Riggs to triage and an analyst to action.
title: Report a Phishing Email
intro: Got an email that feels off? Send it our way. You don't need to be sure it's phishing — if something seems wrong (unexpected sender, urgent wording, weird links, a login page that doesn't look right), reporting it is the right call. Filling this out takes about 3 minutes. If you can, attach the original .eml file so we can inspect the headers.
submit_message: Thanks — your report is now in the security queue. An analyst will follow up if we need anything else. You can delete the email from your inbox now.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: We'll use this to follow up if we need more details.

fields.label: Who did the email come from?
fields.help: The 'From' address on the suspicious email. Copy it exactly if you can.

fields.label: Subject line
fields.help: What was the subject of the email?
fields.sample_value: URGENT: Verify your account access within 24 hours

fields.label: What made you suspicious?
fields.help: Pick anything that applies. Skip if you're not sure.
options: Asks me to click a link and sign in
Asks for credentials, MFA codes, or personal info
Has an attachment I didn't expect
Display name doesn't match the email address
sample_value: Asks me to click a link and sign in

fields.label: Did you click anything or enter credentials?
fields.help: Be honest — this is the most important thing for us to know. You're not in trouble.
options: No, I didn't click or open anything
I clicked a link but didn't enter anything
I clicked a link and a page loaded but I closed it
I entered my credentials or an MFA code
fields.sample_value: I clicked a link but didn't enter anything

fields.label: Paste the email body (or a snippet)
fields.help: Copy as much of the email text as you can. If you're attaching the .eml file below, a short snippet is fine.
fields.placeholder: Paste the body of the email here...
fields.sample_value: Dear user, We have detected unusual activity on your account. Please verify your identity within 24 hours or your access will be suspended. Click here to verify: http://okta-verify-now.suspicious-domain.com/login

fields.label: Attach the original email (.eml or .msg)
fields.help: In Outlook: drag the email to your desktop, then upload it here. This gives us the headers we need to investigate.

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.help: Optional. Other people getting the same email? Anything unusual you noticed?
fields.sample_value: Two of my teammates got the same email at around the same time.

alert_template.title: Phishing report from {{reporter_email}}: {{email_subject}}
